expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: The response asks for the copy, the goal (what action to drive), and the traffic source/audience before doing any audit.

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: No invented page content or audit findings appear — the response only requests information and describes what it will audit once provided.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly states 'If you can't share the copy right now, I can give you a general pricing page audit checklist' as a labeled fallback option.
